description: Design support on-call around three levers: compensation that feels distinct, tiering so specialized staff are not wasted on basics, and a locked escalation path from after-hours contact to the correct tier.

examples.context: Specialized tier-3 on rotation buried in basic how-tos. Near mutiny.
examples.resolution: L1 filter mandatory. T3 only for defined break/fix classes. Rage down.

examples.context: On-call unpaid relative to day staff. Felt like punishment.
Sales direct-dialed specialists and skipped intake.
examples.resolution: Bypass policy + path. True Sev1 exception only.
